summary: Iteration 238 — Registro Obblighi Commessa MVP Testing Complete. Backend: 23/23 tests passed. Frontend: All UI features verified including sync button, 4 groups (Bloccanti, Da completare, Da verificare, Chiusi), filters by source/category, status dropdowns, and collapsible section.
seed_data_creation: Created test commessa, ramo_normativo, cantiere_sicurezza, and emissione_documentale for testing sync engine. Cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Registro Obblighi Commessa MVP fully working. Key features: (1) POST /api/obblighi/sync/{commessa_id} collects obligations from 5 sources (Evidence Gate, Gate POS, Soggetti, Istruttoria, Rami Normativi). (2) Deduplication via dedupe_key prevents duplicates on repeated sync. (3) Auto-close when source condition is removed. (4) Route ordering correct - specific paths before generic {id}. (5) Frontend ObbrighiCommessaSection shows in CommessaHubPage with Shield icon, sync button, 4 groups, filters, and status change dropdowns.

backend_api.GET /api/obblighi: PASSED - List all obligations for user with optional filters
backend_api.GET /api/obblighi/{id}: PASSED - Get single obligation by ID
backend_api.PATCH /api/obblighi/{id}: PASSED - Update status, resolution_note, sets resolved_at
backend_api.POST /api/obblighi/sync/{commessa_id}: PASSED - Trigger sync, returns created/updated/closed counts
backend_api.GET /api/obblighi/commessa/{commessa_id}: PASSED - List obligations for specific commessa
backend_api.GET /api/obblighi/summary/{commessa_id}: PASSED - Returns total, bloccanti, aperti, chiusi, da_verificare counts

sync_engine.creates_obligations: PASSED - Creates obligations from source modules
sync_engine.deduplication: PASSED - Second sync creates 0 new (all deduplicated)
sync_engine.auto_close: PASSED - Closes obligations when source condition removed

source_modules.gate_pos: PASSED - Collects from cantiere sicurezza campi_mancanti/blockers
source_modules.soggetti: PASSED - Collects missing mandatory roles (DATORE_LAVORO, RSPP, COMMITTENTE, etc.)
source_modules.istruttoria: PASSED - Collects segmentation pending, classification uncertain, high-impact questions

frontend_ui.shield_icon: PASSED - Shield icon with 'Registro Obblighi' title
frontend_ui.status_select: PASSED - data-testid='status-select-{id}' dropdowns on each row

code_quality_notes.route_ordering: Specific sub-paths (/commessa/, /summary/, /bloccanti/, /sync/) correctly placed BEFORE generic /{obbligo_id} in FastAPI router
code_quality_notes.auto_close: Obligations auto-closed with resolution_note when source condition removed
code_quality_notes.mongodb_indices: Indices created for dedupe_key, commessa_id+status, blocking_level_sort+severity_sort
